title: handle_move duplicates actor fetch
description: inbox.rs handle_move() calls fetch_and_upsert_actor() on line 1414 (which internally does a full HTTP GET + parse + DB upsert), then immediately re-fetches the same actor document with a raw reqwest client (lines 1431-1458) just to inspect the alsoKnownAs field. This doubles the network RTT to the remote server. The fix is to either (a) return the raw JSON from fetch_actor alongside RemoteActorData, or (b) add an alsoKnownAs field to RemoteActorData parsed in parse_actor_document.
close_reason: Duplicate of smallhold-9ouq.16 (same handle_move double-fetch issue)
